title: eupatorium fendleri
intro: Eupatorium fendleri, also known as Fendler's boneset, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to relieve pain and reduce inflammation. Eupatorium fendleri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its health benefits, and it has also been used in folk medicine for its purported ability to aid in the removal of toxins from the body.
